paper_title: Air Sampling and Ice Core Analysis

methods.description: Process for extracting air samples from Vostok ice cores to analyze historical atmospheric concentrations of CO2 and CH4 over glacial-interglacial cycles.

steps.description: Air initially enclosed in Vostok ice provides our only record of variations in the atmospheric concentrations of CO2 and CH4 over a complete glacial-interglacial cycle.
steps.searchable_summary: extract air samples from Vostok ice cores
outputs: air samples with CO2 and CH4 concentrations

steps.description: A close correlation between these gas concentrations and the Vostok isotopic temperature has been confirmed by extending the record over part of the previous cycle.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze correlation between gas concentrations and isotopic temperature

methods.description: Modeling used to date ice cores and study long-term interaction between climate and the dynamics of large ice sheets.

steps.description: Ice sheet modeling is used to date ice cores and study long-term interaction between climate and the dynamics of large ice sheets.
steps.searchable_summary: model ice sheet dynamics to date ice cores

steps.description: Models predict that ice sheet over Vostok will thin during cold periods.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze model predictions of ice sheet thinning
